GitHub LinkedIn
4 YEARS SOFTWARE ENGINEERING | GOOGLE CLOUD CERTIFIED PROFESSIONAL DATA ENGINEER | GOOGLE CLOUD CERTIFIED PROFESSIONAL ML ENGINEER | CO-FOUNDER PADOVIA.IT | SECOND PLACE IN PHYSICS IN ITALY AT THE EUROPEAN OLYMPIADS OF EXPERIMENTAL SCIENCE |
FEATURED ON:
CORRIERE DEL VENETO | RADIO VENETO24 | MATTINO DI PADOVA | IL GAZZETTINO | PADOVAOGGI |
SPEAKER AT:
ROME FUTURE WEEK | SFSCON | RECLAIM THE TECH BOLOGNA | LINUX DAY MILANO | NEXTCLOUD CONFERENCE |

About

Hello! I am Grigory Vodyanov, a software engineer specializing in data engineering and MLOps, an automation engineering student at the prestigious Politecnico di Milano, and an Open Data advocate. Professionally developing since the age of 15. I speak English, Italian, and Russian at a native level. You will mostly find me in Milan, Italy.
My favorite topics to work on are digital sovereignty, open data, mobility, and automation.

Experience

Nextcloud - Software Engineer

Development of groupware apps with a focus on Data Protection and Privacy, occasional enterprise customer support, and working with contributions from the open source community. I implemented AI features such as email summaries and event time suggestion.
I also held events for my co-workers such as technical workshops and brainstorming sessions.

2.5 years — Present

WebPD & Eniac - ERP Development

I started my career developing enterprise solutions for mostly industrial-focused companies in Northern Italy, managing orders, clients, inventory, and so on.

6 months

PadoVia - Co-Founder

PadoVia is a non-profit developer group grown from 2 to 7 people who create software for improving public transport user experience. Our flagship product is the PadoVia app, which tracks real-time transport in the city of Padua, Italy.
My main contributions are managing the team and creating the data transformation pipelines for handling analysis and storage of real-time data from hundreds of vehicles.

1.5 years - Present

Linux System Administration

I have been administering linux servers for years and have deep knowledge of virtualization, package management, service management, web hosting, etc.

5 years - Present

Politecnico Open Unix Labs

Ever since joining the Politecnico di Milano I have been an active member of the PoUL association, holding courses regarding open source software.

6 months - Present

Devodia - Self-employed Software Consulting

I occasionally pick up software consulting projects I find interesting through my firm Devodia. My main focus is full-stack solutions often with some form of RAG-based agent integration. My most frequent clients so far have been fashion brands.

6 months

Education

Politecnico di Milano

Automation Engineering (BSc)

I am currently pursuing a degree in automation engineering at the Politecnico di Milano, ranked #20 worldwide in Engineering by QS. I am an active member of Politecnico Open Unix Labs.

Liceo Scientifico E. Fermi Padova

Applied Science

I studied applied science in the top ranked scientific lyceum in the city of Padua, serving as elected school representative, and winning second place in Italy in physics at the European Olympiads of Experimental Science (EOES).

Projects

PadoVia App

Real-time predictions and monitoring of public transport in Padua, with over 50k unique monthly users, featured on 6 media outlets including Il Corriere della Sera. Available as a webapp, iOS, and Android app. I co-founded the project, working mainly on the data analysis and backend, and now manage the team of 7 developers.

Node.js microservices, Redis, Clickhouse, React Native, PostgreSQL, Dokploy, Docker

Open project

AYLA Archives AI

AI Consultant for fashion rental startup AYLA. Gives styling suggestions, product recommendations, and assembles outfits based on moodboard inspiration. Built on Google Cloud with an advanced RAG querying system.

Vertex AI, Pub/Sub, Firestore, Cloud Run, GraphQL, Firebase, GCS, Python

Open project

AI GTFS Fixer

Open-source tool that automatically updates public transport route information using an LLM workflow. Scrapes news from a transport authority's website, analyses articles, finds relevant stops/lines/timetables, and dynamically applies detour, strike, or cancellation changes.

LlamaIndex, Qdrant, Redis, OpenAI Platform, OSRM routing

Open project

Genesis - AI simulation engine that forecasts plant growth under given environmental conditions. Generates a photorealistic image of the final state with a scientific description. Built with Vertex AI, LlamaIndex RAG, and Node.js.

H-orizon - NASA Space Apps Challenge 2024. Vue.js app that analyses weather and climate data and suggests crops to plant based on location.

Mindrev - Flutter study app with flashcards and notes.

Talks

Digging deeper into Pinia

Nextcloud Community Conference 2024

Exploring advanced, lesser-known features of the Pinia state management system for Vue.js. It is used for sharing application state between components.

Motion Lab Berlin

Open data and public transport: How sharing stimulates innovation

Rome Future Week 2025

How Open Data empowers young people to make a change in their community without having to undergo complex formal processes, making societal impact accessible. Referencing my project PadoVia.

Sapienza University, Rome

Open Data and public transport: How to develop for mobility

Linux Day Milano 2025

How to leverage Open Data to create applications for mobility, focusing on OpenStreetMap, OpenTripPlanner, and UX design.

Politecnico di Milano

Linux terminal scripting course

Linux 101 organized by Politecnico Open Unix Labs

As part of the Politecnico Open Unix Labs association I held a course on linux terminal scripting for Politecnico di Milano students. The purpose of the association is holding courses on CS topics not covered by regular university lessons.

Politecnico di Milano

I also held booths, workshops, and sessions at FOSDEM Brussels, Reclaim the Tech Bologna, SFSCON Bolzano, Nextcloud Company Week, and more. Here's also my series on the radio Veneto24 about tech news.

Certifications

Google Cloud Certified Professional Data Engineer

08/2025

ELT/ETL, BigQuery, BigTable, Spanner, DataFlow, DataProc, Cloud Storage, etc.

Google Cloud Certified Professional Machine Learning Engineer

09/2025

Tensorflow, BigQuery ML, Vertex AI, Ethical AI, etc.

NIS2 - DataGuard Executive Training

08/2025

European Network and Information Security Directive 2

W3Cx: Introduction to Web Accessibility

09/2025

Covering features and how to test for web accessibility
